## Safety Checklist

- [ ] I am not sharing IPs/domains/ports/endpoints.
- [ ] I am not sharing profile IDs.
- [ ] I am not sharing keys or secrets.
- [ ] I am not posting screenshots that reveal sensitive context.

## What did you expect?
